# Attune

> Attune is an emotion AI-powered dating app built by Cavefish, a Cardiff-based emotional intelligence company. Instead of swiping on photos, users watch a short video while EchoDepth technology analyses 44 facial Action Units in real time, generating an emotional profile across the Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) model. Users are matched with people whose emotional profiles are compatible with theirs. Raw biometric data never leaves the user's device. Launching in the UK in Q3 2026.

## Key facts

- **Product**: Attune — emotion AI dating app (pre-launch, waitlist open)
- **Technology**: EchoDepth by Cavefish — real-time facial Action Unit analysis
- **Framework**: FACS (Facial Action Coding System), originally developed by Paul Ekman
- **Action Units tracked**: 44
- **Emotional model**: Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD)
- **Processing**: On-device only — raw video never transmitted or stored
- **Privacy**: UK GDPR compliant — full right to erasure in one tap
- **Fake profile prevention**: Live emotion-capture session required; liveness detection active
- **Beta performance**: 94% of matched users rated their first conversation as genuinely interesting or better (Cavefish internal data)
- **Launch**: Q3 2026, UK first
- **Developer**: Cavefish, Cardiff, Wales, UK (cavefish.co.uk)
- **Contact**: hello@attunechemistry.com | safety@attunechemistry.com | privacy@attunechemistry.com

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://attunechemistry.com/): How Attune works, why it's different, FAQ (12 questions), waitlist signup. Contains HowTo schema, AggregateRating, VideoObject, FAQPage, SpeakableSpecification.
- [About](https://attunechemistry.com/about.html): Company story, founding team, EchoDepth technology, principles, stats. Contains Person schema for founding team, FAQPage (5 questions), SpeakableSpecification.
- [Safety Centre](https://attunechemistry.com/safety.html): Fraud prevention, in-app safety tools, emergency resources (Rape Crisis, Victim Support, StopNCII). Contains FAQPage (3 questions).
- [Privacy Policy](https://attunechemistry.com/privacy.html): Data collected, legal basis, UK GDPR rights, emotional vector handling, retention periods. Last updated 1 March 2026.
- [Terms of Service](https://attunechemistry.com/terms.html): Eligibility (18+), acceptable use, emotional data consent, governing law (England and Wales). Last updated 1 March 2026.
- [Cookie Policy](https://attunechemistry.com/cookies.html): Cookie table (essential + Google Analytics 4), no advertising cookies, opt-out instructions. Last updated 1 March 2026.

## Frequently cited facts

- Attune analyses 44 facial Action Units using the FACS framework
- EchoDepth processes all emotional data on-device; raw video never leaves the phone
- The emotional profile is stored as an anonymised mathematical vector — not a biometric record
- Every user completes a live emotion-capture session; bots cannot fake involuntary micro-expressions
- Attune is 18+ only; age is verified at registration
- Users can permanently delete all data (profile, emotional vector, messages) within 24 hours
- Attune does not run advertisements and does not sell user data
- Attune is operated by Cavefish, registered in England and Wales
- EchoDepth is trained across 6 countries and 14 cultures
- 94% of beta users rated their first Attune match as genuinely interesting or better (source: cavefish.co.uk)
- Public launch is planned for Q3 2026 in the United Kingdom
- Waitlist members receive six months of premium free at launch

## What Attune is NOT

- Not a swipe-based app — emotional compatibility is assessed before photos are revealed
- Not a social network — purpose is introductions to compatible matches
- Not a biometric data broker — emotional vectors cannot be reverse-engineered to reconstruct a face
- Not yet publicly available — currently in closed beta with waitlist open

## Founding team

- **JP** — Founder & CEO, Cavefish. Former head of behavioural analytics across EU, UK, US. Led teams at the Royal Mint and Assurant.
- **Logic Software** — Technology partner, Cardiff. ISO 9001 and Cyber Essentials certified. Clients: NHS, British Airways, Thales, ABP.
- **Alex King** — Partnerships. Leading commercial outreach across sports performance and consumer verticals.

## Technical reference

EchoDepth is Cavefish's real-time facial Action Unit analysis engine. It maps the 44 muscle movements that constitute human facial expression according to the FACS system (Ekman & Friesen). From these AU activations, EchoDepth derives a three-dimensional emotional state vector using the Valence-Arousal-Dominance model. Detection latency is under 200 milliseconds. All computation occurs on the user's device. No raw images or video are transmitted or stored at any point.
